results.title: Brain.fm: Functional music to improve focus | Product Hunt
results.content:
5.0

Based on 7 reviews

Review Brain.fm?

Brain.fm is highly praised for its ability to enhance focus and productivity, with users frequently incorporating it into their work routines. Many appreciate its simplicity and effectiveness in creating a distraction-free environment. Users report that it helps them quickly get "in the zone" and maintain concentration, with some noting its benefits for meditation and relaxation as well. While a few users mention needing to adjust volume settings, the overall feedback is overwhelmingly positive, highlighting its role as a valuable tool for deep work and focus.

results.title: Ultimate Second Brain: Capture & organize everything in Notion. | Product Hunt
results.content:
5.0

Based on 2 reviews

Review Ultimate Second Brain?

Ultimate Second Brain is highly praised for its ability to organize and streamline users' lives through Notion. Users appreciate its customizable templates, which allow for personalized organization of tasks, notes, and plans. Many find it invaluable for decluttering their digital lives and enhancing productivity. The intuitive design and comprehensive features, such as dashboards and custom views, are frequently highlighted. Overall, users express satisfaction with the value it provides, despite some noting the cost, especially in regions like Malaysia.

My Second Brain is my favourite software tool to keep track of almost my entire life. Since I started using it, my life is so much more organised, me as a person became more reliable and I have much more free space in my mind, because I dont have to hold so much information from many areas of my life. I couldnt recommend it enough. I love the fact that I can customise the template to fit my needs. I even got a 50% student discount from the original price!

results.title: Notion Second Brain: A Notion system for capturing and organizing your thoughts | Product Hunt
results.content:
Subscribe

SocialX

Review Notion Second Brain?

Notion Second Brain is praised for its ability to help users efficiently capture and organize information. Users appreciate its versatility, making it suitable for entrepreneurs, freelancers, content creators, and students. The system is noted for its user-friendly interface and adaptability to various workflows. However, some users express concerns about potential scams, emphasizing the importance of ensuring secure transactions. Overall, the product is well-received for its functionality and effectiveness in managing digital information.

Second Brain for AIp/second-brain-cloudflareRahil Pirani•

### What happens when Second Brain remembers two things that contradict each other?

One of the earliest problems we ran into building v2 was this:

You decide something in January. You change your mind in March. You ask about it in July.

Second Brain for AIp/second-brain-cloudflareRahil Pirani•

7d ago

### You never have to tag a note for Second Brain to know it is related to something else

Most knowledge tools put the connection work on you. Tag this. Link that. File it in the right folder.

Second Brain v2 builds the graph automatically.

## Persistent memory for Claude, ChatGPT & Cursor. Free.

4.0•2 reviews•

1.1K followers

Visit website

LLM Memory

Every AI conversation starts from zero. Your projects, decisions, and preferences disappear as soon as you close the chat. Second Brain fixes that. It is a self-hosted memory layer that works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP client. You can store context once and recall it by meaning instead of keywords. It includes duplicate detection, semantic search, and a web UI. Built on Cloudflare, it offers a free tier and your data remains yours. MIT licensed. [...] Overview
